[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeVector](../../TextmodeVector.md) / div

# Method: div()

## Call Signature

```ts
div(value): this;
```

Divide this vector by a scalar.

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `value` | `number` | Scalar divisor. |

### Returns

`this`

This vector.

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="div" encoded-code="-IDI4KSB7CgkJdHJhaWwuc2hpZnQoKTsKCX0KCglmb3IgKGxldCBpID0gMDsgaSA8IHRyYWlsLmxlbmd0aDsgaSsrKSB7CgkJY29uc3QgZmFkZSA9IGkgLyB0cmFpbC5sZW5ndGg7CgkJY29uc3QgZ2x5cGggPSBmYWRlID4gMC43MiA_-" />

## Call Signature

```ts
div(value): this;
```

Divide this vector by vector-like components.

Missing components are treated as `1`.

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `value` | \| readonly `number`[] \| \| [`TextmodeVector`](../../TextmodeVector.md) \| \{ `x`: `number`; `y`: `number`; `z?`: `number`; \} | Vector-like value or component array to divide by. |

### Returns

`this`

This vector.

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="div" encoded-code="-IDI4KSB7CgkJdHJhaWwuc2hpZnQoKTsKCX0KCglmb3IgKGxldCBpID0gMDsgaSA8IHRyYWlsLmxlbmd0aDsgaSsrKSB7CgkJY29uc3QgZmFkZSA9IGkgLyB0cmFpbC5sZW5ndGg7CgkJY29uc3QgZ2x5cGggPSBmYWRlID4gMC43MiA_-" />

## Call Signature

```ts
div(
   x, 
   y, 
   z?): this;
```

Divide this vector by numeric components.

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `x` | `number` | X divisor. |
| `y` | `number` | Y divisor. |
| `z?` | `number` | Z divisor. |

### Returns

`this`

This vector.

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="div" encoded-code="-IDI4KSB7CgkJdHJhaWwuc2hpZnQoKTsKCX0KCglmb3IgKGxldCBpID0gMDsgaSA8IHRyYWlsLmxlbmd0aDsgaSsrKSB7CgkJY29uc3QgZmFkZSA9IGkgLyB0cmFpbC5sZW5ndGg7CgkJY29uc3QgZ2x5cGggPSBmYWRlID4gMC43MiA_-" />
